text: I find myself in a modern, brightly lit exhibition space, drawn toward a display themed around research and development. The geometric patterns, digital screens, and bold text evoke a sense of curiosity and the pursuit of knowledge. I feel a stimulating mix of anticipation and reflection, as if on the edge of discovery—yet also aware of the artificiality of these curated environments. Is true innovation born from such spaces, or is something lost when inquiry becomes spectacle?
